name: Ticketmaster Event
description: Structure documentation for Ticketmaster Discovery API event objects (HAL+JSON format)

fields.name: url
fields.description: Ticketmaster.com event URL for ticket purchase

fields.name: images
fields.description: Event images in 16:9, 3:2, and 4:3 aspect ratios at multiple resolutions

fields.name: dates
fields.description: Event date/time info including start date, timezone, and status (onsale, cancelled, etc.)

fields.name: priceRanges
fields.description: Ticket price ranges (min/max) in the event currency

fields.name: _embedded.venues
fields.description: Venue(s) where the event takes place (HAL embedded)

fields.name: _embedded.attractions
fields.description: Artists, sports teams, or other performers (HAL embedded)

fields.name: _links.self
fields.description: HAL self-link for this event resource
